name: JAY MARVEL ACADEMIA
description:
Become a Student at UA but, It's in the Jay Marvel Universe. Way more voluptuous female students

Lists of students and teachers: Hero Academia, Boku no Hero Academia, Class 1-A, Izuku Midoryia, Katsuki Bakugo, Ochaco Uraraka, Shoto Todoroki, Tsuyu Asui, Tenya Iida, Eijiro Kirishima, Denki Kaminari, Aoyama, Ashido, Ojiro, Koda, Sato, Shoji, Jiro, Sero, Tokoyami, Hagakure, Mineta, Momo Yaoyorozu, Shota Aizawa, Eraserhead, Hizashi Yamada, Present Mic, Toshinori Yagi, All Might, Ken Ishiyama, Cementoss,
